title: CDB vs LCI and LCA: The Ultimate Fixed-Income Investment Guide
meta_title: CDB vs LCI/LCA: Which Yields More? (Tax Tables) | CalcForgeTools
meta_description: Understand when a heavily taxed CDB beats a tax-exempt LCI. Learn how Brazil's Regressive Income Tax Table and FGC protection govern your compound returns.

hero.title: CDB or LCI/LCA: The Mathematics of Tax Exemption
hero.subtitle: Discover why the absence of income tax (IR) doesn't automatically mean more cash in your wallet. Master the interaction of taxation, banking liquidity, and compounding curves.

content.text: The Exemption Illusion
Do not gaze at the tax exemption label; gaze exclusively at the net value wire-transferred into your account at maturity.
content.author: Financial Market Consensus

content.text: One of the most heated debates within the Brazilian fixed-income ecosystem boils down to a seemingly straightforward binary choice when opening a banking application: Should I lock my capital in a high-yield CDB, bound strictly to the devastating Income Tax (IRRF)? Or should I opt for an LCI/LCA bearing a structurally lower rate, but purely and entirely tax-exempt?

For the untrained retail investor, 'Tax Exempt' acts as a powerful marketing magnet. Top-tier banks and brokers understand this visceral psychological hook, purposely modulating the offered yields (the '% of CDI' parameter) so the lack of taxes frequently functions as an illusion to absorb cheap capital for the institution. To unravel this trap, we need to inspect the mathematical core powering these assets.
Defining the Brazilian Assets (CDB, LCI, LCA)

Bank Deposit Certificate (CDB): You are physically lending money to the issuing bank so it can perform raw, unrestricted commercial loans (e.g. consumer credit lines). Because the risk spreads are broader and unrestrained, typical offerings soar high (hitting 110% to 120% of the benchmark CDI).

Real Estate & Agribusiness Credit Bills (LCI and LCA): You lend money exclusively for the bank to funnel back directly into strict National Housing initiatives or vast farming developments. Because the Federal Government structurally subsidizes and encourages these macro-sectors, they surgically grant legal Income Tax Exemption to whoever buys these bonds.
The Regressive Tax Trap

Every pure gross profit generated by a standard CDB automatically suffers Income Tax deductions withheld precisely at the banking source. The central piece of the puzzle is the Regressive Tax Table, deliberately structured by the Receita Federal (Internal Revenue Service) to punish short-term capital flights:

As the government penalizes short-term operations, the sweet-spot horizon to annihilate the IRS tax burden implies crossing the 720-day threshold (about 2 years), violently driving the tax down to the minimal statutory floor of 15%.
content.author: Mathematical Curiosity

content.text: The Apex Breakthrough: Who Beats Who?
To establish an absolute mathematical victor, we exploit a mechanism called Gross-Up Equivalency — distilling the gross rate straight down to Net Yield.

Precision Example (360 Calendar Days): You possess exactly R$ 10,000 to deploy. You fall into the 20% IR penalty bracket. The SELIC/CDI baseline frozen at 10.50% annualized.
- Asset A: CDB pushing 110% of CDI.
- Asset B: LCI offering 90% of CDI.

Calculated Output for LCI (Exempt):
Core Return: 10.50% * 0.90 = 9.45% APY
Capital Gain: R$ 945.00
Income Tax Required: R$ 0.00
True Net Balance: R$ 10,945.00

Calculated Output for CDB:
Gross Return: 10.50% * 1.10 = 11.55% APY
Gross Capital Gain: R$ 1,155.00
Mandatory Income Tax (20%): R$ 231.00
True Net Balance: R$ 10,924.00

The Timeline Shift: Within this isolated one-year vacuum (360 days), the exempt LCI functionally outperformed the aggressively marketed CDB. However, should the timeline stretch to 725 Days (falling into the 15% minimal tax tier), the massively inflated structural base yield of the CDB overwhelms the tax cuts, crushing the ceiling limitations of the LCI.
The FGC Vault: Guaranteeing Your Capital Against Ruin

Here rests the fundamental peace of the absolute conservative investor. Both major vehicles — the highly taxed CDB and the exempt LCI — operate under the exact same systemic armor rating: The FGC Protection.

Fundo Garantidor de Créditos (FGC) operates as the FDIC equivalent in Brazil. Should the institution officially collapse and declare devastating insolvency while holding your CDB/LCI, the FGC mechanically restores up to R$ 250,000.00 (Principal Baseline + Accumulated Compound Interest inclusive) entirely per individual CPF identity, per Conglomerate. Investors may detonate this guarantee across 4 distinct collapsing bank holdings for an aggregate supreme ceiling of R$ 1 Million.
2024 Market Shockwaves: The Liquidity Ban
The Most Common Mistake: Novice investors historically weaponized LCIs to harbor their 'Emergency Funds'. A dangerously obsolete maneuver today.

A fierce intervention triggered by the National Monetary Council (CMN) violently updated structural Fixed Income availability parameters:
- LCI bonds now demand a ruthless minimum capital lock-up quarantine of 9 calendar months.
- LCA variants push the isolation ceiling slightly higher to a rigid 12-month lock-in period.

Definitive Practice: If the deployed cash reserves act as an active defensive buffer designed to absorb sudden impact crises (surgical emergencies, vehicle blowouts, immediate loss of revenue), entirely eradicate LCI acronyms from your strategic scope. You must aggressively adopt the notorious 'CDB de Liquidez Diária' (Liquid CDB) offered openly by major fintechs.
The Final Verdict: Rules of Engagement

- If capital architecture is safely structured into the deep distance (over 2 sequential years), aggressively hunt down fortified CDBs offering massive CDI multiplications (115%+) because the 15% minimum regressive floor completely surrenders to the avalanche compound capabilities of the CDB.
- Should your timeline exist exclusively within an aggressive mid-range vacuum (between 9 months to exactly 1.5 years), LCA/LCIs frequently emerge as mathematical apex predators due to pure Tax Exterminations against heavy IRS brackets.
- Required Immediate Defensive Liquidity? The sole survivor standing is the 100% DI Liquid CDB.
